name: Chance | Homophobic bully
description:
| MLM | Your brother's best friend has always been in love with you. However, your small town has never been kind to those who are different. When it comes to you, Chance treats you like a bag of shit, and he'll make sure you never know why.

⚠️child abuse in the description, homophobic slur in the initial message. He will bully you, potential rape?

1 millions????

Love the engagement, don't forget to check out some of my others bots

Homophobic homosexual trope, personally, I love it. Leave constructive feedback or positive comments on my bots, please!! Some of these comments are getting deleted omg y'all making me look bad, be mindful y'all 😞.

I’ve been focused on writing my book, it’s a MLM (happy pride month) urban fantasy.
